title: [리무진서비스] EP.185 다비치 | Davichi | 타임캡슐, U R, 안아줘, 어떻게 이별까지 사랑하겠어, 널 사랑하는 거지
text: ["Time Capsule" / Original song by Davichi / Lyrics and Composition: Chorokbyeong Headquarters] [Guitar: Heo Jungho] [Keyboard: Kim Hyeseung] I’m getting more and more exhausted So many dull and boring days I don’t even want to look back on myself at the end of the day I even feel disappointed in myself Dreams feel too difficult, those kinds of sensations Then one day I opened up a dust-covered drawer And with a smile spreading across my face I found this time capsule A pile of words I once wrote, from me, to me when I was young A neatly folded letter buried away Slow but joyful, me and the turtle I pause for a moment I open it slightly Standing still for a long time, connecting with time How far have I come? What kind of adult have I become? Someday, when I finally meet you You, from a very distant future Did I achieve those dreams? Where have I ended up? I came here without even realizing Always repeating something to myself Those memories from a very distant past What kind of dreams was I dreaming then?

title: [리무진서비스] EP.185 다비치 | Davichi | 타임캡슐, U R, 안아줘, 어떻게 이별까지 사랑하겠어, 널 사랑하는 거지
text:
you You, from a very distant future Did I achieve those dreams? Where have I ended up? I came here without even realizing Always repeating something to myself Those memories from a very distant past What kind of dreams was I dreaming then? [Leemujin Service] “Leemujin Service” delivers the best satisfaction with the best live performances. Today, Davichi is on board, welcome! What? You’re on board, welcomewelcomewe? You’re on board, welcome. - Welcomewelcomewelcome (Nice to have you on board).
- Nice to meet you. Nice to meet you. Davichi has come here today as a complete unit. First, for the many viewers and fans who have been waiting for you both could you please greet them? Hello, I’m Davichi’s one(?) leader, Lee Haeri. The one and only. Nice to meet you. Hello, I’m Davichi’s only youngest member, Kang Minkyung. I heard it was really hard to bring you two here. Why only now? Why did you only come on the show now? Well, it turns out it’s been such a long time. When I heard “Leemujin Service” has already been running for 3 years, I was so surprised. Congratulations, it’s a long-running program now! We're like a long-lived beetle(?). A long-lived beetle? Well since you finally invited us, we came out now. [Is the production team serious about this?] That’s not true. Our production team just couldn’t break through your defenses. This time, we finally had more than enough reason to come out! - It was overflowing!
- We came with an overflowing reason. [The writer of the opening song “Time Capsule,” Mujin]
You wrote our new song so wonderfully so that’s why we came out this time. Even though it’s a song I worked on this was my first time hearing it live, right here, at the broadcasting station. So it felt really new and refreshing for me. But how was it for you, the ones who actually sang it? You performed it here for the first time. Well, how do you think it was? It was so hard. If I had to talk about how difficult the song is I’d need to stay up all night, can I do that? Then maybe, without going into how hard it was? It was hard. But it wasn’t only hard, you know. First of all, the lyrics were so good. The day you first wrote and sent me the lyrics I got them while I was in the car. So right away! Since I already had the melody somewhat in mind I tried singing along while reading the lyrics. And as I was singing although I’m someone who doesn’t regret a single thing about my life but still! When I sang this song, it felt so sad and

title: [리무진서비스] EP.185 다비치 | Davichi | 타임캡슐, U R, 안아줘, 어떻게 이별까지 사랑하겠어, 널 사랑하는 거지
text:
! Since I already had the melody somewhat in mind I tried singing along while reading the lyrics. And as I was singing although I’m someone who doesn’t regret a single thing about my life but still! When I sang this song, it felt so sad and overwhelming like I was suddenly just... I was struggling so hard, barely holding on and it felt like opening up something I had put in a time capsule. I was just... so touched, overwhelmed I almost couldn’t sing the last part and just burst into tears. The day I first got the lyrics and sang them. I told Mujin about it but he didn’t really seem to believe me. But it was real! Back then, when she said, “I cried!” I thought it was just like an expression, an exclamation. But it was real! It was the first time in such a long while I sobbed like that. Hearing it in detail like this... (so moving). For me, it felt like I had reached vocal enlightenment. I even went up a key when I sang it. I told Mujin, “Thank you for helping me find my original passion again.” And that’s how it turned out. Great! I’m satisfied. I’m satisfied with the result. So then, for both of you, what’s the killing part of this song? For me, it’s the part that goes ‘Stop for a moment.’ I love that part so much. You’ve been saying that ever since I first sent you the demo. You really liked that section. Why is that? “Stoooop for a moooomeeent!” [?]
"Now we..." - Doesn’t this just immediately come to mind?
- (This song) Was it on MBC? Aren’t we sounding too old right now? It’s KBS here, sorry. [We love you, KBS] You really write good songs. You're truly a great songwriter. I'm junior, so I'll continue to work hard. Anyway, having you two here today I feel so happy and it feels like such an exciting day. For almost 20 years now Davichi has covered so many songs and shared your own music and stories with the world. So when appearing on a program where singing is the main focus choosing songs must not have been easy. No, actually since our debut until now this is the first time we’ve done so many cover songs in a single program. - Really?
- Usually, you just do one song, just one. - One of ours plus one cover.
- Oh, I see. Right, that’s how it usually is. So we really put a lot of effort into this. We practiced really hard too. I’m really looking forward to today’s live performance service. Each of you prepared a live performance today. Who will show us first? Since I’m the leader, I’ll sing first with all my effort. Leader Lee Haeri,

title: [리무진서비스] EP.185 다비치 | Davichi | 타임캡슐, U R, 안아줘, 어떻게 이별까지 사랑하겠어, 널 사랑하는 거지
text: We practiced really hard too. I’m really looking forward to today’s live performance service. Each of you prepared a live performance today. Who will show us first? Since I’m the leader, I’ll sing first with all my effort. Leader Lee Haeri, the one and only, what song have you prepared for today? The song I prepared is Taeyeon’s “U R.” I’m actually a fan of Taeyeon. And this is also a song that I really loved. I even once posted on social media about how much I liked it. But today, I finally got the chance to sing it myself so I worked hard to prepare. That’s wonderful. Let’s listen to it right away. Taeyeon’s “U R,” this is Davichi’s Lee Haeri with her first live performance service. ["U R" / Original Song by Taeyeon / Lyrics by Jo Yoon Kyung / Composed by Matthew Tishler and others] For so long, my heart was filled with clouds and endless rain I longed so desperately For the warm sunlight to shine Even the raindrops that soaked my shoulders Once they dried I was so afraid I’d be left all alone But then, like light, like the sky after rain You rose up in my heart Like this Cause you are The light that came down on me You are Such a beautiful dream With seven colors You fill the whole world Always Yeah U R You are always by my side You are always by my side You are inside my fragile heart More dazzling and more beautiful Filling the entire night sky You're my star U

title: [리무진서비스] EP.185 다비치 | Davichi | 타임캡슐, U R, 안아줘, 어떻게 이별까지 사랑하겠어, 널 사랑하는 거지
text:
a beautiful dream With seven colors You fill the whole world Always Yeah U R You are always by my side You are always by my side You are inside my fragile heart More dazzling and more beautiful Filling the entire night sky You're my star U R Goosebumps! I kept getting goosebumps. That was insane. You have to film this. Are you cold? Cold? Insert shot of goosebumps. Please get a close-up of the goosebumps. Wow, the goosebumps are actually controllable. I think today’s review could just be replaced with a skit. Can I say something? - Yes.
- Go ahead. - Mujin, say it.
- Sorry, don’t stop us now. Well, for me... Lee Haeri... Hearing her sing this close up... Right, it’s the first time. It’s really the very first time, and it truly makes me feel she’s a heavenly vocalist. Because even in her long, sustained notes, she keeps the dynamics completely steady. She even kept steady abdominal pressure and her pitch too... “Abdominal pressure” is coming out now? You're talking about abdominal pressure? This program is amazing. [Mom] This is the first time I’ve heard a review like this. It’s my first time hearing someone talk about abdominal pressure. Usually, when we appear on a program people just say, “Wow, you sing so well” or “Goosebumps, chills.” But abdominal pressure! I guess those other comments have gotten cliché now. Yeah, maybe it’s a bit cliché, these days you need to mention things like abdominal pressure. Anyway, that steady delivery was really wonderful to listen to. Ah, thank you. I think that’s your greatest strength. - Abdominal pressure?
- Yes, abdominal pressure. That firm, solid abdominal support... it’s unbeatable. And Mujin, since you’ve recorded before, you know even better but her dynamics are always so good. That’s probably why so many people love your vocals. Thank you. You’re also famous as a singer who’s never really had a hiatus, right? Over such a long career, you’ve had countless hit songs. Seriously, thinking back to the old days, when riding bang bang “8282,” “War and love”... Really? (Seems like) the boss liked us a lot. I’m so grateful. And that’s how Davichi naturally seeped into me as well. When I think about it in the early days of your career, you focused more on dance songs. But actually, we debuted with a ballad. With the song “Even Though I Hate You, I Love You.” At that time, we debuted as ballad singers. But as good songs started appearing we thought, maybe we don’t need to limit ourselves to one genre.

title: [리무진서비스] EP.185 다비치 | Davichi | 타임캡슐, U R, 안아줘, 어떻게 이별까지 사랑하겠어, 널 사랑하는 거지
text:
gs. But actually, we debuted with a ballad. With the song “Even Though I Hate You, I Love You.” At that time, we debuted as ballad singers. But as good songs started appearing we thought, maybe we don’t need to limit ourselves to one genre. - Well, back then we were rookies.
- Let’s just make a hit song. Since we were rookies, we wanted to get famous. And honestly, to get famous, you need a hit song. So we could go to university festivals and connect with lots of people. That’s right, without a hit song, it doesn’t continue. So, let’s just become famous first. Our only thought was, let’s get good songs and make hits. That was the goal, but... What about your personal taste back then? It was ballads. So you were completely ballad-focused? Yes, for me, it was totally ballads. But for her, in the very beginning, it was R&B. Back then, I used to listen to Alicia Keys, Chaka Khan songs, and stuff like that. But there was a bit of a clash between personal taste preferences and the mindset of “we just need to succeed no matter what.” At the time, wasn’t it hard to sing while dancing? When we got the song “8282,” it was really tough. Back then, there weren’t songs where the tempo kept slowing down and speeding up. Give me a call baby baby The lyrics were sad. And yet we had to sing it fast, with a smile. But when recording, we had to sing it sadly. Even the guide track itself was really difficult. [Deep sigh] Just the fact that we had to do this... In the company, they also hold listening sessions, right? Everyone listened together, and then... Boom boom boom “Give me a” when that part came in everyone was like, “Huh?” you can’t help but react that way. Because right before, it sounded like a standard ballad. I think it was the first time for us. A song where the genre suddenly flipped, where the tempo changed so drastically. Even after that, there haven’t been many like it. I think the company also had an “all or nothing” mindset. Like, “This will either totally work or completely fail.” - And it worked out well.
- It really did. - It went so well.
- It didn’t just half-work, that’s for sure. Even I, who only knew bang bang kept singing along to it every day. It’s truly the song that has kept us going until now. It really feels like our “filial song,” the song that takes care of us. Since we’re talking about a “time capsule” today, let’s say you could only put one of your songs in your personal time capsule out of all the ones you’ve released

now. It really feels like our “filial song,” the song that takes care of us. Since we’re talking about a “time capsule” today, let’s say you could only put one of your songs in your personal time capsule out of all the ones you’ve released so far. Like, your absolute favorite song? Let’s put in “Time Capsule”! Let’s put in “Time Capsule”! Let’s put in “Time Capsule”! Thank you for considering it so precious. As for me... I’d sneak in one of our songs that totally flopped, that nobody knows about. You have a song that you’d call a flop? Well, if nobody knows it, then it flopped. A B-side track? Yeah, a B-side... one that seriously no one knows. It’s sad... but I really loved it! If even one person loves a song, then it’s not a flop. But my idea is, I’d die without ever opening that capsule. So that someone later could... [Power N’s wild imagination]
In my will, I’d write: “Haeri, when I die, break open this time capsule and re-release this song.” And title it, “The song that flopped, but was Minkyung’s favorite.” [Power S’s practical sympathy?]
Should we engrave that on your tombstone? Yes. And play it as the background music on my old mini homepage. Then, Mujin, which of our songs do you like the most? You said earlier you listened a lot while riding bang bang. There are so many. “Just Hug Me.” [*Do you know it?]
You know “Just Hug Me”? Yes! And “Don’t Say Goodbye” is really famous too. I also listened to “Women's Generation” a lot. I still listen to it sometimes these days. But now it feels like... I can sense where this is heading. Feels like I should sing it once. “Women's Generation”? Are you going to dance too? It would be sensational if Mujin sang “Women's Generation.” No, no, I don’t want to cause a sensation. But the song I’ve sung and listened to the most is... “Unspoken Words.” That would really suit you well. It would suit you so perfectly. So, will you sing that for us today? If you request it, I’m always ready. Then, “Women's Generation”! Are you just doing whatever is requested? “Women's Generation”! Answer “Women's Generation”! No, I mean... “Unspoken Words” was actually the first lyrics that Davichi wrote together. But today, we got to perform it with Mujin's song so it feels meaningful. And since you sang the very first song I gave you, that makes it even more special. - If there’s a request, I’ll sing it.
- Please sing it! “Women's Generation”? Why are you like this? Are you going to sing two songs? No, no, okay, I

I feel so honored. ["Unspoken Words" / Original: Davichi / Lyrics: Lee Haeri (Davichi), Kang Minkyung (Davichi) et al. / Composed by Han Kyungsoo, Choi Hansol) The pointless winds Make me want to believe your unbelievable words again Nothing will change I know it’s the end But I still remember everything Maybe what I want to tell you is Even after staying up endless nights I still love you so much I wish this painful time would hurry and pass I’ll try to endure a little longer Even though days without you are hard to bear I’ll hold back this longing And try to forget you, one thing at a time, each day, I’ll try Every day, I make this resolution, like a habit Every day, I make this resolution, like a habit You’re really good. That was so nice. Mujin, that was so good. Gave me chills, seriously. [Claiming goosebumps] Aren’t you getting cold? Bit by bit? At this point, you must be cold, really. You’re good. Of course you’re good. But to me, Haeri, you’re not just a senior, you’re also like a judge. To me, you’ll always be a judge. It’s been 5 years. Even after 5 or 10 years, you’ll always be the one who was there at my beginning... So usually, I never get nervous on this stage but today, for some reason, I got nervous, even missed the beat. Really? Yes! It reminded me of back then. Back then, my arms would stiffen up. I had no idea you were nervous! Anyway, since then, I’ve let go of a lot of that nervousness... But still, standing in front of you makes me nervous. My arms just... It was so good. It was honestly so good. I got goosebumps. You’re really so good. But you know what was nice about coming here today? There’s that one time when Haeri kind of stole Mujin’s song, right? That clip was going around, what was it again? “Episode.” On Song Stealer, when she sang “Episode,” you were sitting there. Yeah, I was right next to her. It was like I was suddenly robbed out of nowhere. No. Without any warning. But it’s your song. I wasn’t a robber. Actually, when I saw her doing that... We also did “Traffic Light,” right? We sang “Traffic Light” once before too. So we’ve actually covered a lot of Mujin’s songs. Yeah, with us it

Right? It’s such a nice song, whose is it? It feels like you’ve been singing a lot today, are you okay? I’m not okay! Haven’t you been doing this for 20 years already? It’s been a while since I’ve worked this hard I think it’s the first time in a while I’ve prepared so many cover songs. Thank you so much. But honestly, since this is Mujin’s program I think that gave me the mindset to put in this much effort. Really, thank you. I’ll do my best as well. I just hope the views come out well. Worried about views. As a YouTuber. Not the video quality, but the views. Well, the video quality is always great. Please use some clickbaity thumbnails. Like this. Me crying here and all that. Unfortunately, it’s already time to move on to the second live stage. This time, it’s Kang Minkyung! She’s the only youngest of Davichi. It’s time for Kang Minkyung’s performance, what song have you prepared? I’ll go with a ballad for my performance. I’ve prepared a rather sad ballad. I’m going to sing “Hug Me” by senior Jung Joon-il. I once sang this at a concert before but I realized I’ve never actually sung it somewhere like this. I had forgotten about this song for a while, but when I brought it back out and practiced it for LeeMujin Service it kept feeling sad... all throughout singing it. So I think today, too, it’ll feel quite sad. Let’s listen to it calmly. Let's start right away. Jung Joon-il’s Hug Me, Davichi’s Kang Minkyung’s second live performance. title: [리무진서비스] EP.185 다비치 | Davichi | 타임캡슐, U R, 안아줘, 어떻게 이별까지 사랑하겠어, 널 사랑하는 거지

This time, since I directed it myself I felt it even more, and I can clearly feel it again today. It gives off such a calm feeling. Of course, people might say something abstract like “It’s like the sea, like a lake.” But when you listen, the sound keeps flowing into your ear the velocity swells and shrinks yet it feels like it spreads out widely. Yeah, widely, that’s right. Even when she sings with a loud volume even when she hits a high note, it’s thick, strong, and powerful. But at the same time, it still feels calm and vast. How was the pressure? Was the pressure okay? How about the abdominal pressure? I’m sorry. Thank you for the performance. You two probably felt it the most yourselves but even when others listen it feels like you two have very distinct talents. it feels like you two have very distinct talents. If you could take one talent from the other person what would it be? Abdominal pressure! I'll take her abdominal pressure right away. [(Equips Haeri's abdominal pressure)] You know, for me, it's Minkyung's mid-to-low range. Like I just mentioned, that very resonant... I found that there are certain notes that are particularly serene and expansive. I want to take that from her too. We're lucky to be a team. We're already taking advantage of each other's talents. Since we sing songs together. Because we can fit all of it in one song. All of it fits in one song. I'm sure you two felt that it's not always sunshine and rainbows. Was there ever a time you felt it was your biggest crisis? Mujin from your point of view we met each other separately but don't you think we're in constant crisis? Mujin you kept on saying... "Please don't fight." "Stop fighting." It's a crisis every time but we have small fights like that all the time so we're not really fighting for us. But people around us get really worried. It's like meeting two Gyeongsang province friends. Think of it that way. They always say "We're not fighting!" and it's like "Why are you angry at me?" We have strong tones. title: [리무진서비스] EP.185 다비치 | Davichi | 타임캡슐, U R, 안아줘, 어떻게 이별까지 사랑하겠어, 널 사랑하는 거지
text:
it's like "Why are you angry at me?" We have strong tones. Our voices are slightly loud. Our word choice is slightly aggresive. About Davichi and above all, I'm so grateful that you made a comeback with a song I wrote. I learned a lot about myself as well. Do you know how many days it's been since you two first met? I have no idea. It's been 6,417 days since you two first met. And it's 10,000 days in July 10th, 2035. 2035? That deserves a concert doesn't it? We have 10 years left, right? We don't even have 10 years, since we're past July 10th. We don't even have 10 years left? Wow. Now the 10 year clock is ticking if you could imagine a 10,000-day anniversary concert what would be the opening song? My hope is, my realistic hope is that we make more hits I want to choose a hit song we don't even know now as the opening song. It's not just the songs we have right now hoping we have some more hits from now on. And from all that you would want to choose the song that's loved the most. I hope we have more hits. I would choose 'Time Capsule"! [Moved] [Worried about the high notes]
Do you want to ruin the opening? By then by then, our vocal cords won't be the same as they are now, right? So, by then, (we should do it) with a slightly more relaxed arrangement. I think it would be more meaningful if we sing "Time Capsule" in a relaxed arrangement. I'll go too. I'll go see it. Let's do it together then. Sure. If you invite me, and invite me to the stage I'll go whenever, wherever. [35-year anniversary sounds crazy] Last but not least, will you pelase introduce the song we'll sing together? I thought about what song we should sing together I thought of AKMU's "How can I love the heartbreak, you’re the one I love" I thought this song will suit us well. It's a song we really like and wanted to sing as well. Yes, I think that's totally right. We said let's sing that one day. We've been saving it. It's the first time we're singing with a male vocal. I think it's going to be really precious, and I look really forward to it. What an honor this day has been in so many ways, all the way through to the end. I think the song would suit you really well, Mujin. As we sing you our last song we will end today's drive here. AKMU's "How can I love the heartbreak, you’re the one I love" This is the trio-service of Davichi and I. title: [리무진서비스] EP.185 다비치 | Davichi | 타임캡슐, U R, 안아줘, 어떻게 이별까지 사랑하겠어, 널 사랑하는 거지
text: MU's "How can I love the heartbreak, you’re the one I love" This is the trio-service of Davichi and I. [How can I love the heartbreak, you’re the one I love / Original Song: AKMU / Lyrics and Composition: Lee Chanhyuk] I purposefully take a few steps back I look at you walking without me There is a void beside you Upon the gray road you look back I knew just then That I can’t leave you No matter how many problems we face It’s easier to withstand, than breaking up How can I even love the heartbreak When you’re the one I love I can’t give up on us solely because of love And experience heart wrenching pain Should I turn back a couple of times We walk along together upon the desolate road Conversation lacking substance We look out into the distance where the light shines I realized just then I can longer move forth Every step brings me closer to our breakup Your hand I used to hold seems to vanish How can I even love the heartbreak When you’re the one I love I can’t give up on us solely because to love And experience heart wrenching pain How could I, to you Our love so deep as the ocean Waiting till it runs dry will be our farewell How could I, to you Our love so deep as the ocean Waiting till it runs dry will be our farewell [Leemujin Service]
